emails.subject: Pioneer Natural
emails.body: Pioneer Natural Daren do you have a problem if I copy the 2000 deal (362125) for Pioneer and make a new one for 2001. They have flow in Jan. This is giving me a meter allocation exception forJan. Let me know thanks.
